subject: An armored humanoid figure rides a large bird-like mount at speed across a desert or arid landscape, red banners streaming behind
description: A humanoid figure in silver plate armor rides a large bird-like mount — a flightless or semi-flightless creature with reddish plumage visible at its neck and tail — at full gallop across an open arid landscape. The rider leans forward in the saddle, and the mount's neck stretches ahead. Bold red cloth streamers or banners trail dramatically behind both rider and mount. The background shows pale desert hills or mesas under a light sky, with sparse vegetation suggesting the Thunder Junction setting. The image conveys speed and frontier exploration.
foreground: Armored rider on large bird-like mount at full gallop, red streamers trailing
background: Pale desert mesas and scrubland under light sky
emotion: Determined, forward-moving — the rider's posture signals urgency and purpose
